title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness for building self-directed agent workflows. Cole Medin uses it to orchestrate multi-model reasoning pipelines where Opus handles deep planning tasks and Kimi K2.6 handles implementation, validation, and research steps.
